title: Papyrus #0179: Greek-Egyptian Horoscope
description: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — horoscope document.
introduction: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — horoscope document.

translation.text: From the papyrus collections of Greco-Roman Egypt: a horoscope document preserved in the dry sands. These papyri document daily life in ways no monumental inscription can.
